description: A user reports that a specific report is timing out and not loading, while other reports work fine.

nodes.task_description: Ask the user for the parameters of the report they are trying to run (e.g., date range, filters).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the user is running a report with a very large date range (3 years).

nodes.task_description: Hypothesize that the large query size is causing the timeout.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the likely cause.

nodes.task_description: Advise the user to run the report in smaller date chunks (e.g., quarterly) to avoid timeouts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a workable solution to the user.
